Name: -1_likes_music_poor_friend
Representative_Docs: ['That the person likes degrading music, like rock music. That the person likes junk food.', 'I think that my friend, Jimmy, has poor taste. His music tastes are poor, low quality songs that require no talent and I do not enjoy.', "The one thing that I think this person has is poor taste in the movie genres he watches. He likes to watch Lifetime movies which usually involve men who aren't treating women well and he likes horror movies. He isn't some deviant person and is really nice actually, but I feel he has poor taste in movies. This is really a hard question to answer. The only other thing I can think of is his taste in food. He puts hot sauce on everything he eats and he also like eating moose heart and liver, which is gross."]

Name: 0_poor_know_way_clothes
Representative_Docs: ["My mother has poor taste. We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor.", "I can't think of anyone with poor taste.", "Well, I would have to say yes I know someone who I consider to have bad taste. There is a difference though between someone who doesn't know any better versus someone that knows how to act but ignores that fact. Again, to me taste and style are two different animals. Style can change and evolves, I think but taste is more of a character quality.  And I am a huge snob probably lol, although I would never tell anyone or show in any way that I thought someone acted in bad taste or had bad style either way. That would be in bad taste, in my opinion."]

Name: 1_clothes_dress_clothing_tight
Representative_Docs: ["I have a sister in law who just doesn't have good taste at all. The way she dresses had not a bit of style to it. She mainly just puts her clothes on and goes and they don't flatter her at all. She doesn't try to decorate her home up and put nice touches to it.", 'I have a friend who is heavy. She chooses clothes to try and hide her weight that make her look bad. Instead of choosing to emphasize her positive attributes, she tries to distract from her body with clothes that have odd patterns and color combinations.', "This person dresses in baggy clothes and has a poor taste wear the clothes are not fitted and the fashion is outdated and the clothes don't match well with the shoes and colors."]
